description: Queen Patch 6 (4 March 2020) — Alliance Rejoin Cooldown, Knockdown Loot Changes, Hideout Respawn Penalty, Travel Cost Modifiers, Elite Dungeon Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Alliance Rejoin Cooldown Changes
sections.description: Patch 5 introduced a 3-day cooldown for leaving and rejoining the same alliance. With this patch, the duration has been increased.
sections.searchable_text: Alliance Rejoin Cooldown 3 Days 7 Days leaving rejoining same alliance

sections.heading: Knockdown Loot Loss Changes
sections.description: Items without a durability stat will no longer be destroyed upon knockdown. Item destruction rate and durability loss upon death (killed by another player, suicide, etc.) are not affected.
items: Items with durability: 5% durability loss on knockdown (no change)
Items without durability: now immune to destruction on knockdown (previously 10% destruction chance)

Intended to help introduce newer players to combat without item loss in yellow zones, and to improve the loot experience in Elite Dungeons where a large percent of loot was previously destroyed by repeated knockdowns
sections.searchable_text: Knockdown Loot Loss items durability destruction immune 10% 5% yellow zones Elite Dungeons

sections.heading: Respawn Penalty in Hideouts
sections.description: A feature that delays players from leaving a Hideout set as "Home" after respawning there multiple times. The effect has a 10-minute cooldown — after 10 minutes without dying the counter resets. Intended to prevent overuse of repeated-suicide defense strategies when defending Hideouts.
items: First Respawn: no penalty
Second Respawn: 30 seconds
Third Respawn: 60 seconds
Fourth Respawn: 120 seconds
Fifth Respawn or more: 240 seconds
sections.searchable_text: Respawn Penalty Hideout Home multiple respawn 10 minutes cooldown suicide defense 30 60 120 240 seconds

sections.heading: Travel Cost Modifier Changes
items: Adjusted travel cost modifiers for resources, laborer journals, and luxury goods
In most cases these were reduced by half; in the case of some T2 journals these were slightly increased
This will also result in a significant overall reduction to recovery costs for these items from Hideouts
This is only a first step in reviewing fast travel cost modifiers — further adjustments may come in future patches
sections.searchable_text: Travel Cost Modifier resources laborer journals luxury goods reduced half T2 Hideouts recovery costs

sections.heading: Elite Dungeon Changes
items: All Avalonian boss chests now have a chance to give Avalonian Artifacts
Slightly lowered rate of Avalonian Artifacts received from final boss (Sir Bedivere)
Overall, the drop rate of Avalonian Artifacts for any given dungeon will be approximately twice what it was before
Health and damage of all Avalonian enemies reduced by 14%
sections.searchable_text: Elite Dungeon Changes Avalonian boss chests Avalonian Artifacts Sir Bedivere drop rate twice health damage enemies 14%

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Players can now join the Smart Cluster Queue while mounted
Changed visibility of Steelplate Cougar from "hidden" to "locked" in mount skins UI
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Smart Cluster Queue mounted Steelplate Cougar hidden locked mount skins UI

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Hellgate final boss / chest notification now correctly displays 1-minute countdown
Fixed an issue where characters from other guilds in the friends list would sometimes display incorrect avatar, avatar ring, and "last seen" duration
Fixed an issue where Shoes of Tenacity (Avalonian Leather Armor) spell "Blind Spot" would deal damage twice when used with Spinning Blades
Undead Governor (Undead Randomized Dungeon Boss): Hitbox of Spinning Skull area has been corrected, and the spell now applies spell immunity to the correct target
Additional minor graphical, terrain, animation, UI, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Hellgate boss chest notification 1 minute countdown friends list avatar ring last seen Shoes of Tenacity Blind Spot Spinning Blades Undead Governor Spinning Skull hitbox spell immunity graphical terrain animation UI audio localization
